strategies.label: Enable CloudTrail logging (guided choices)

fields.description: Automatically add required S3 bucket policy statements for CloudTrail delivery.
Enable CloudTrail logging across all regions.

dependency_checks.message: CloudTrail log delivery and retention increase S3 storage and request costs.
This PR bundle requires a log-delivery S3 bucket. Create or identify the bucket and set trail_bucket_name before apply.

warnings: CloudTrail log delivery and retention can increase storage costs.
strategies.decision_rationale: Family resolver kept compatibility profile 'cloudtrail_enable_guided' executable for strategy 'cloudtrail_enable_guided'.

recommendation.rationale: Matrix cell risk_medium__criticality_high maps to default recommendation 'pr_only'. Risk is medium and business criticality is high. Criticality evidence: data_sensitivity=0.55, privilege_level=1.00, internet_exposure=0.00, matched_signals=none. Relationship context is incomplete, so the recommendation remains conservative and advisory unless policy overrides it.
